sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n33126" key="e)/ktufos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἔκτυφος</orth> [prob. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῡ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype></foreign>, <sense id="n33126.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">deluding, empty</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">μοῦσα</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Oenom.</author> </bibl> </cit> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2018.tlg001:5:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Eus.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">PE</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.11</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
